metadata.name: imp-startup
metadata.title: 😈 Welcome, Clever Imp - Unleash Your Creativity

story.introduction: 🔥 Greetings, mischievous Imp! Your creativity and cunning make you perfect for development and innovation. Let's set up your creative workspace.
story.context: Imps have development access, script creation abilities, and creative tools for building custom solutions.
story.purpose: Configure development environment and creative tools

variables.name: CREATIVITY-FOCUS
variables.prompt: Where does your mischievous creativity flow best?
variables.help: We'll set up development tools optimized for your creative focus

variables.name: DEVELOPMENT-STYLE
variables.prompt: How do you like to approach development projects?
variables.help: This configures your development environment and tool preferences

variables.name: SHARING-PREFERENCE
variables.prompt: How do you want to share your creative works?
variables.help: Controls default permissions and sharing settings for your projects
